home.title: Welcome to ISMRM-LATAM
home.mission_statement: The Latin America Chapter promotes opportunities for scientific collaboration between professionals of MR in medicine and biology working or studying in Latin America and the rest of the world.

bylaws.title: Chapter Bylaws
bylaws.content: The Chapter operates under the International Society for Magnetic Resonance in Medicine. Our bylaws ensure equitable representation across Latin American nations and the promotion of MR education.

history.title: Our History
history.content: Established to bridge the gap between Latin American researchers and the global MR community, the chapter has grown from an inaugural board in 2024 to a vibrant network of clinics and labs.
